narrative.headline: What 2014 Ford Focus owners report most
narrative.summary: The dominant complaint category for this model year centers on power train behavior, with owners describing unexpected vehicle movement at stops and on inclines. Engine and fuel system complaints follow, with owners reporting sudden loss of power or stalling at speed, sometimes accompanied by warning lights. Electrical system complaints describe the vehicle losing power to the wheels while in motion, leaving owners coasting without drive.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle rolling backward after a complete stop, as well as the vehicle moving forward or backward on its own on inclines without driver input. · 3 fire · 23 crash · 12 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle stalling while driving at highway speed, with a stop-safely warning light illuminating at the time of the failure. · 8 fire · 18 crash · 11 injured

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report the gas pedal becoming unresponsive while on the freeway, causing the vehicle to decelerate with the driver unable to maintain speed. · 1 fire · 10 crash · 8 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report receiving a stop-safely warning message followed by immediate loss of power to the wheels, leaving the vehicle coasting without drive. · 2 fire · 9 crash · 9 injured
